acceptance.baseline: Requested scripts/racketsport/import_w6_labelpack_tasks.py was absent from scripts/; Wave-6 run artifact importer always created a project and tasks when non-dry-run.
acceptance.after: Mocked CVAT-client unit test proves first run creates 2 tasks, second run creates 0 tasks and records 2 skipped/already_imported tasks.
acceptance.target: Safe re-run behavior by name/fingerprint against CVAT API or import ledger, with explicit skip accounting.

acceptance.metric: ITEM 2 Vite allow-root degradation from /tmp worktrees
acceptance.baseline: web/replay Vite dev server allowed only resolve(__dirname, '../..'), which can miss macOS /tmp absolute /@fs/ paths when a worktree resolves through /private/tmp.
acceptance.after: Vite config now keeps repo root plus realpath and /tmp alias in server.fs.allow only; typecheck/build passed.
acceptance.target: Minimal config-only dev-server fix, no web/replay/src edits, no production build weakening.

changes: /Users/arnavchokshi/Desktop/pickleball/scripts/racketsport/import_w6_labelpack_tasks.py:83 added guarded importer with ledger/API skip detection, fingerprints, project reuse, and skip accounting.
/Users/arnavchokshi/Desktop/pickleball/tests/racketsport/test_import_w6_labelpack_tasks.py:73 added mocked CVAT idempotence regression test.

full_suite.command: MPLBACKEND=Agg .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/racketsport/test_import_w6_labelpack_tasks.py tests/racketsport/test_owner_ball_label_ingest.py tests/racketsport/test_cvat_annotation_sanity.py tests/racketsport/test_cvat_detection_dataset.py -q; cd web/replay && npm run typecheck; cd web/replay && npm run build; MPLBACKEND=Agg .venv/bin/python scripts/racketsport/import_w6_labelpack_tasks.py --dry-run > /tmp/w7_import_w6_dry_run.json && .venv/bin/python -m json.tool /tmp/w7_import_w6_dry_run.json >/dev/null; PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 MPLBACKEND=Agg .venv/bin/python scripts/racketsport/list_scaffold_tools.py --root .; PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 MPLBACKEND=Agg .venv/bin/python scripts/racketsport/audit_dead_code.py --root .; PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 MPLBACKEND=Agg .venv/bin/python scripts/racketsport/audit_storage_policy.py --root . --json
full_suite.failure_notes: No failures. 14 pytest tests passed plus 6 command gates. npm build emitted the existing Vite large-chunk warning but exited 0.

honest_issues: I did not contact the live CVAT server; idempotence is covered with a mocked CVAT client and the importer ledger/API-list code path.
The importer defaults its ledger to the existing Wave-6 lane import_report.json, so a real re-run will overwrite that report with schema_version 2 skip/import accounting.
Unrelated dirty/untracked files remain preserved in the worktree, including configs/ssh/a100_known_hosts, several tests, CVAT export artifacts, labelpack zips, and brand-exploration/.
next: Real CVAT re-run should start with --dry-run, then non-dry-run against labelfactory, preserving the schema_version 2 ledger for future skip detection.
